hero.badge: Empowering Skills for a Digital Future Since 1997
hero.title: Where is Ambitions Are
hero.subtitle: Super Sys-Tech Computers Centre Umerkot is committed to delivering industry-relevant computer education with practical, hands-on training. We provide professional diploma and certificate programs affiliated with NAVTTC ISLAMABAD, STEVTA, S.B.T.E, and TTB Sindh, empowering students to build successful careers in IT, freelancing, and digital technologies.

about.title: Leading with Educational Integrity
about.principalMessage:
At Super Sys-Tech Computers Centre Umerkot, our mission is to empower students with practical knowledge and modern IT skills that meet today’s digital demands. We believe that education is the key to success, and our focus is on building confidence, creativity, and technical expertise in every student.
With a commitment to quality education and discipline, we strive to create a supportive learning environment where students can grow, innovate, and achieve their goals. Our aim is not only to teach technology but to prepare individuals for real-world challenges and opportunities.
achievements: Affiliated With: (NAVTTC ISLAMABAD) National Vocational & Technical Training Commission
Affiliated With: (STEVTA SINDH) Sindh Technical Education and Vocational Training Authority
Affiliated With: (S.B.T.E SINDH) Sindh Board of Technical Education
Affiliated With: (T.T.B SINDH) Trade Testing Board Sindh
about.description: Super Sys-Tech Computers Centre Umerkot was established in 1997 by Sham Lal with a vision to provide quality computer education to the rural areas of Sindh. With over 29 years of experience, the institute has evolved into one of Umerkot’s leading centers for IT education. It has successfully trained thousands of students who are now actively contributing to Pakistan’s digital economy in fields such as freelancing, web development, graphic design, and digital marketing.
about.mission:
To provide high-quality, practical, and affordable IT education that equips students with in-demand skills such as web development, graphic design, digital marketing, and e-commerce.
We aim to create opportunities for students by fostering innovation, creativity, and professional growth, enabling them to achieve success in freelancing, employment, and entrepreneurship.
about.vision: To become a leading institute of information technology in rural Sindh, empowering youth with modern digital skills and transforming them into confident professionals who contribute to the global digital economy.

courses.title: (D.I.T) Diploma in Information Technology
courses.description:
Introduction to Information Technology, Computer Hardware, Operating Systems (Windows), Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Access), Internet & Email
Graphic Designing Basics, Web Designing (HTML & CSS), Programming Fundamentals, Database Management, Digital Marketing Basics, Freelancing & Career Development, Final Project

testimonials.name: Ahmed Ali
testimonials.message: STC Umerkot transformed my career. The practical training and certified diploma helped me land my first IT job within months of graduating.

testimonials.name: Saira Banu
testimonials.message: The graphic design course at STC gave me skills that are in demand everywhere. I now work as a freelance designer on international platforms.
